name: Maple Cream Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil maple syrup and salt until it reaches the soft ball stage (234 - 238°F). Remove from heat.
2. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature.
3. Add butter, vanilla, and half of the chopped nuts. Beat until creamy.
4. Gradually add the remaining chopped nuts. Continue beating until the mixture is firm enough to mold into small balls.
5. Form the balls using a spoon or your hands.
6. Place the balls on wax paper to harden.
